title: Private Swaps on Solana! Deep Dive on Bungee Incognito

audit.reason: The submission is incomplete and lacks depth and content. It only includes a title and a vague mention of requirements but no actual work, content analysis or substantial information about 'Bungee Incognito' or its relevance to Solana.
audit.improvements: Include a detailed analysis of Bungee Incognito and its functionality on Solana. Provide specific requirements, implementation details, potential benefits, and technical insights. Ensure the document is complete and includes all necessary sections for a comprehensive deep dive.
